**Validator Name:**\
PlanTree

PlanTree aims to give back to nature while following modern DevOps practices.\
Our infrastructure is distributed across several locations using bare-metal servers, 
some of which are partially powered by solar energy.\
A portion of validator revenue is redirected toward planting trees — making every delegator a contributor to environmental restoration.

**Networks You Are Currently Validating:**\
AtomOne, Arkeo, Axone, IXO\
AuM: 70 000$

**Links to Your Digital Presence:**\
Website: https://plantree.org \
Github: https://github.com/plantree-validator \

**Contacts:**\
Email: contact@plantree.org \
Discord: .upnp \
telegram: @belupnp

**Why You Are Interested in Validating on gno.land:**\
We believe Gno-based smart contracts in combination with AtomOne can become attractive ecosystem to many applications around the world and the best way to speed up the adoption - support it!

**Contributions to gno.land**\
We contribute by monitoring, snapshots, explorers, RPC endpoints, and related tooling.\
In the future, we hope to help build a web-based validator management tool to simplify node operations.

**server-type:** on-prem
Equinox is the professional validator, infrastructure provider and IBC relayer. | https://www.equinoxdao.xyz/

**Validator Name:** **Nodeist**

Nodeist is the trusted staking service provider for blockchain projects. 100% refund for downtime slash. Contact us at [hello@nodeist.net](mailto:hello@nodeist.net)

**Networks You Are Currently Validating:**
- Atomone (ATONE)
- Jackal Protocol (JKL)
- Realio Network (RIO)
- Dymension (DYM)
- Lumera Protocol (LUME)
- And other 20+ Networks

**Links to Your Digital Presence:**
- Website: https://nodeist.net
- X(Twitter): https://x.com/Nodeistt
- GitHub: https://github.com/Nodeist

**Contact Details:**
- Email: [hello@nodeist.net](mailto:hello@nodeist.net)
- Telegram: https://t.me/nodeistt
- Discord ID: nodeist

**Why You Are Interested in Validating on gno.land:**

We've been following Gno.land's development with great enthusiasm since its early days. The platform's unique approach to smart contracts through the Gno language presents one of the most innovative solutions in the blockchain space today. Its modular, community-driven architecture aligns perfectly with our vision for decentralized infrastructure.

**Contributions to gno.land:**
- Early Network Participation
- Educational Resources
- Community Support
- Planned Infrastructure: Committed to launching public RPC endpoints and maintaining daily snapshots to enhance network accessibility

Validator Name: Primestake.top

We power next-generation blockchain networks with institutional-grade staking and validation infrastructure. Our battle-tested nodes deliver maximum security and consistent uptime so your assets never stop earning.

Networks Currently Validating:
- AtomOne (ATONE)

Digital Presence:
Website: https://primestake.top
GitHub: https://github.com/PrimeStakeTop

Contact:

Discord: primestake.top

Why Validating on gno.land:
At Primestake.top, we are particularly excited about gno.land's innovative approach to smart contract development through the Gno language. This execution model represents the kind of technical evolution we actively support within blockchain ecosystems.

Contributions to gno.land:
- Early network participation
- Educational initiatives
- Community growth
- Infrastructure investment

Why It Matters:
Our approach ensures gno.land has both strong infrastructure and long-term ecosystem support. We focus on performance optimization, knowledge sharing, and resilient validator architecture.

Validator Name: Nodedog

Nodedog delivers reliable staking and validation solutions for next-generation blockchain networks. With a strong focus on security and consistent uptime, we ensure your assets operate efficiently and securely.

Contributions to gno.land:
- Early network participation

files.name: proposal.gno

args:
General: We are a team of experienced validator operators, infrastructure engineers, and builders who have delivered reliable services across multiple networks. Now, we are starting a new chapter with Akkadia—focused on building and operating secure, high-performance infrastructure for the next generation of decentralized ecosystems.

Contact details: 
Email: infra@slowe-labs.com
Discord: outofoil_78691

Why are you interested in validating on gno.land?
To support a robust, decentralized smart contract platform built on Gno and help strengthen its validator ecosystem.

What contributions have you made or are willing to make to gno.land?
We are building Akkadia and will provide secure, reliable infrastructure while contributing technical feedback and ecosystem growth.

Validator Name
Ubik Capital

Networks Currently Validating
Solana, Cosmos Hub, Cronos, Injective, Aleph Zero, Band Protocol, Coreum, Oasis Network, ICON Network, Polkadot, and ecosystem operations around Ethereum.

Total AUM
N/A (publicly undisclosed at this stage).

Digital Presence
Website: https://ubik.capital
X: https://x.com/ubikcapital
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ubikcapital/
Discord: https://discord.gg/gGj3NdQGxG
Telegram: https://t.me/ubikcapital
Medium: https://ubikcapital.medium.com/
GitHub: https://github.com/ubikcapital
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ubikcapital

Contact Details
Email: contact@ubik.capital
Telegram: @ubikcapital

Why We Are Interested in Validating on gno.land
Ubik Capital supports censorship-resistant and community-owned infrastructure. We want to help secure gno.land and participate actively in its governance and validator ecosystem.

Contributions to gno.land
- Reliable validator operations with strong uptime and monitoring.
- Public infrastructure support as needed (RPC and operational tooling).
- Active testnet participation, incident reporting, and technical feedback.
- Community support and ecosystem collaboration with developers and operators.

Validator Name
Ubik Capital

Networks Currently Validating
Solana, Cosmos Hub, Cronos, Injective, Aleph Zero, Band Protocol, Coreum, Oasis Network, ICON Network, Polkadot, and ecosystem operations around Ethereum.

Total AUM
N/A (publicly undisclosed at this stage).

Website: https://ubik.capital

GitHub: https://github.com/ubikcapital

Contact Details
Email: contact@ubik.capital
Telegram: @ubikcapital
Discord: https://discord.gg/gGj3NdQGxG

Why We Are Interested in Validating on gno.land
Ubik Capital supports censorship-resistant, community-owned, and open infrastructure. We want to help secure gno.land long term and participate actively in governance and operator coordination.

Contributions to gno.land
- Reliable validator operations with strong uptime and production-grade monitoring.
- Testnet participation with fast incident reporting and technical feedback loops.
- Operational support for ecosystem needs such as RPC/tooling when required.
- Collaboration with developers, GovDAO members, and other operators.

---
# Validator Profile: Ubik Capital

### **Validator Name**
**Ubik Capital**

### **Networks Currently Validating**
Solana, Cosmos Hub, Cronos, Injective, Aleph Zero, Band Protocol, Coreum, Oasis Network, ICON Network, Polkadot, and infrastructure operations around Ethereum.
* **Total AUM:** Not publicly disclosed.

### **Digital Presence**
* **Website:** [ubik.capital](https://ubik.capital)
* **X:** [@ubikcapital](https://x.com/ubikcapital)
* **LinkedIn:** [Ubik Capital](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ubikcapital/)
* **Medium:** [ubikcapital.medium.com](https://ubikcapital.medium.com/)
* **GitHub:** [github.com/ubikcapital](https://github.com/ubikcapital)
* **YouTube:** [@ubikcapital](https://www.youtube.com/@ubikcapital)
* **Telegram:** [t.me/ubikcapital](https://t.me/ubikcapital)
* **Discord:** [Join Discord](https://discord.gg/gGj3NdQGxG)

### **Contact Details**
* **Email:** contact@ubik.capital
* **Telegram:** @ubikcapital
* **Discord:** https://discord.gg/gGj3NdQGxG

---
### **Why We Are Interested in Validating on gno.land**
Ubik Capital supports censorship-resistant, community-owned infrastructure. We want to contribute as a long-term validator operator on gno.land and actively participate in governance, coordination, and network reliability.

### **Contributions to gno.land**
* **Operations:** Reliable validator operations with strong uptime, alerting, and incident response.
* **Technical Support:** Testnet participation, issue reporting, and feedback during upgrades and release cycles.
* **Infrastructure:** Support for public tooling and operator-facing services as ecosystem needs grow.
* **Community:** Collaboration with GovDAO members, builders, and other validators.

---

---
